creator: seggers@semyam.dinoco.de
text:
The ipf(1) man page mentions a mkfilters(1) man page in the
SEE ALSO section.  But there is not any mkfilters man page.

Fix: 

Either remove the reference or include a suitable man page to
refer to.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Read ipf(1) and then try to read mkfilters(1).
